calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Mar-17-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Marilyn Minger appeared by zoom for Guillermo Reece (Petitioner).
Amanda Ebey appeared by zoom for Sean Simmonds (Guardian Ad Litem).

Ms. Ebey stated that Mr. Simmonds does not have any objections. The Court stated that Probate Code 1003(c) requires the Court to determine the reasonable of fees of the Guardian Ad Litem and where the payment will be coming from. Ms. Ebey stated that she is waiving her fees and costs with regard to the Guardian Ad Litem, and that Mr. Simmonds is waiving his fees. The Amended First and Final Account and Report of Administration, etc. is under submission.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution

Off Calendar Nov-30-2020 Continued To Jan-04-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Oct-26-2020 Continued To Nov-30-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Marilyn Minger appeared by zoom for Guillermo Reece.

At the first calling of the matter Mr., Reece was on zoom and indicated that his Attorney was having technical difficulties with her audio equipment. The matter was passed. At the recalling of the matter, Ms. Minger was on zoom and indicated that Mr. Reece had to leave and was no longer participating in the hearing. The Court questions if any of the five heirs have any adult children. Ms. Minger stated that there are six adult children. The Court informed Ms. Minger that a declaration from her Client identifying all of those folks is needed and that her Client needs to provide them with notice. Ms. Minger stated that the documents are ready to go and will be filed, that Sean Simmons (proposed Guardian Ad Litem) is not an Attorney and that Mr. Simmons may need to hire an Attorney if required. The Court stated that it wants Mr. Simmons to be represented by Counsel. The Amended First and Final Account and Report of Administrator, etc. is continued to November 30, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. All courtesy copies are to be given to the Probate Examiner as well as the courtesy copies of the ex parte petition for appointment of the Guardian Ad Litem.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Examiner: Helen Trowbridge. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Oct-05-2020 Continued To Oct-26-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Sep-14-2020 Continued To Oct-05-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-03-2020 Continued To Sep-14-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Marilyn Minger appeared by zoom for and with Guillermo Reece by zoom.

Ms. Minger stated that the Heirs want the property to be a family property under the Petitioner's name, that they used the wrong mechanism to effectuate that and that they will finish the process outside of the probate. The Court stated that if the disclaimers are valid, the Heirs would be treated as if they predeceased the Decedent and their Heirs would be the takers of the disclaimed interests. The Court also questions if the other potential Heirs have been noticed. Ms. Minger stated that they haven't been noticed on this. The Court informed Counsel that this needs to be reset for notice and that if there are any Minors, they will need a Guardian Ad Litem. The Amended First and Final Account and Report of Administrator, etc. is continued to September 14, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: K. Cabasares. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-09-2019 Continued To Nov-27-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Marilyn Minger via Court Call for Guillermo Reece.

The Court inquired as to a status request or petition for final distribution. Ms. Minger stated that the family wants to keep the family home, and requested 30-days continuance to prepare the petition for final distribution.

The status on close of estate is continued to November 27, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Shirley Le. Deputy: T. Jackson. Not reported.
